title: Aggregation, Grouping, HAVING, and Honest Metrics
description: A service lead needs ticket counts and response effort by team without double counting or hiding teams with no work. Learners cumulatively produce an audited service-metrics query pack through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Use COUNT, SUM, AVG, MIN, and MAX while predicting empty-set, NULL, and type behavior.
Set result grain with GROUP BY and verify that every selected value is grouped or aggregated.
Separate row filtering in WHERE from group filtering in HAVING.
